mapper.select: SELECT t1.ID, t4.DEPT_NAME, t1.EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_ID, t1.EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_NAME, t1.EQUIP_INSTITUTION_ID, t1.EQUIP_INSTITUTION_NAME, t1.EQUIP_UNIT_ID, t1.EQUIP_UNIT_NAME, t1.CONTENT, t1.STANDARD, t2.EQUIP_ID, t2.EQUIP_NAME, t2.INSPECTOR_ID, t2.INSPECTOR_NAME, t2.START_DATE, t2.END_DATE, t2.INITIAL_NUMBER, t2.DEADLINE_NUMBER, t1.STATUS, t6.FILE_IDS, t1.IS_ABNORMAL, t1.IS_REPAIR, t1.REMARK, t1.EQUIP_TYPE FROM E_PM_MAINTAIN_TASK_ITEM t1 LEFT JOIN E_PM_MAINTAIN_TASK t2 on t2.ID = t1.EQUIP_TASK_ID LEFT JOIN E_M_EQPT_INFO t3 on t3.ID = t2.EQUIP_ID LEFT JOIN SYS_DEPT t4 on t4.ID = t3.USE_ORG_ID LEFT JOIN E_PM_MAINTAIN_PLAN t5 on t5.ID = t1.EQUIP_PLAN_ID LEFT JOIN ( select BUSINESS_ID, LISTAGG(FILE_ID, ',') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY FILE_ID ) FILE_IDS from SYS_FILE_BUSINESS group by BUSINESS_ID )t6 ON t1.ID = t6.BUSINESS_ID where t2.ID = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM E_PM_MAINTAIN_TASK_ITEM WHERE EQUIP_TASK_ID = #{equipTaskId} AND STATUS = 0
